item.title: A message from the Cafeteria:
item.description: Today is the last day for the cafeteria to be open for the school year

item.title: A message from Mr. Decoste:
item.description: Reminder to 7/8 track athletes to return your permission letter to M. Décoste

item.title: A message from the Unity Club:
item.description: A reminder that tomorrow is Multicultural Day at STA! Students are invited to wear tradtional clothes from their cultures, or to dress in the colours of their flag. Contributions for the multicultural potluck can be brought to room 127 tomorrow morning.

item.title: A message from Mme Bourdon:
item.description: 7/8 students interested in participating in the GALA talent show are to sign up with Mme Bourdon at lunch time today. The deadline to sign up will be Thursday May 21st. Mme Bourdon asks all 7/8 staff to please take a moment of class time to have all 7/8 students complete the awards form. This is to be completed as soon as possible. Thank you.

item.title: Another message from Mme. Bourdon:
item.description: On June 11th the 7/8 student council and M&M meat shop will be hosting the Year end BBQ. All items are posted on school cash online.

item.title: A message from Mrs. Curtis:
item.description: Today is the day of the 7/8 University of Waterloo Math Contest! If you have signed up to write the contest, please listen carefully to the following instructions. After announcements, please make sure you have pencil, eraser, and calculator ready to go. Grade 7 students : you will be writing the contest in Room 147 (Ms. May's classroom). Please bring your pencil, eraser and calculator to Ms. May's classroom after announcements. If you are in Grade 8, you will be writing in the LIBRARY. Please bring your pencil, eraser and calculator to the Library after announcements. Good luck to all of our participants!

item.title: A message from Guidance:
item.description: A reminder to all Grade 12 students to submit the Name Pronunciation form for prom and graduation as soon as possible. The form is posted on the Grade 12 Teams Page.

item.title: A message from Ms. Brennan:
item.description: Attention garden club members-it's time to go outside and get our hands dirty! Please meet at the front entrance at the end of the day Thursday for some yard cleanup!

item.title: A message from Mrs. Curtis:
item.description: Grade 8 students who signed up to participate in the Friendship Games next week are asked to return their permission forms to the Resource Room by this Friday to reserve their spot. Mrs. Curtis will be available at the beginning of lunch recess today outside of the 7/8 Resource Room to collect any signed forms.
